title: Junior Business Development Manager at Hubtown

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Hubtown
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Hubtown in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hubtown:
Hubtown is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hubtown!
